releases.notes: Complete end-to-end workflow: GitHub Pages + auto-updater integration with working downloads
Test end-to-end workflow: GitHub Pages + auto-updater integration
Fix auto-updater for github releases public page
Updated auto-updater to use GitHub Pages API for private repository compatibility

**Critical fixes for private repository updates**

• Fixed auto-updater error handling for private repositories
• Improved error messages with clear guidance
• Better authentication handling for GitHub API
• Added support for public releases on private repos

**Critical fixes: Preserve constitution during updates, fix update button error**

• Fixed constitution being overwritten during template updates
• Added constitution backup/restore during spec-kit init
• Fixed undefined.replace() error in auto-updater
• Better GitHub API error handling

**Tree view fixes for specifications and constitution**

• Fixed ConstitutionProvider parsing for actual constitution.md format
• Fixed ProgressProvider task display (support for #T001 format)
• Tree views now correctly show constitution articles and task details
• Improved spec parsing reliability

**Major infrastructure completion**

• Complete VSCode extension documentation
• Added comprehensive command integration
• E2E testing with Playwright
• Performance testing and monitoring
• Distribution workflow automation
• Extension marketplace preparation
